arts.ttl: Bundesliga transfer updates: Eintracht Frankfurt settle on €3.5m for Jens Petter Hauge, Stuttgart prospect Jovan Milosevic receives new loan
arts.sum: As Bundesliga transfer January activity continues across the Bundesrepublik, Eintracht Frankfurt and VfB Stuttgart have confirmed transactions over the past 24 hours.

arts.ttl: Golf great Rory McIlroy enjoys Borussia Dortmund's Yellow Wall experience
arts.sum: Rory McIlroy made the most of his recent off-season relaxation by joining Borussia Dortmund fans for the Matchday 16 encounter against Bayer Leverkusen at the Signal Iduna Park. McIlroy found himself in the middle of the legendary Yellow Wall - the 25,000 capacity south stand at Dortmund that is known around the world for its incredible atmosphere.

arts.ttl: Dortmund join race for Rashford - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund join the race for Manchester United's Marcus Rashford, AC Milan could move for Joao Felix from Chelsea, Juventus want £67m for Andrea Cambiaso.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Borussia Dortmund Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form
arts.sum: A fascinating clash awaits us in the Bundesliga as third-placed Eintracht Frankfurt host 10th-placed Borussia Dortmund on January 17th, 2025. The home side will be looking to consolidate their positio...

arts.ttl: Chelsea launch SHOCK Alejandro Garnacho pursuit
arts.sum: The Argentina international has been heavily linked with an Old Trafford departure over the past few weeks and Chelsea have now joined the race to sign him, as per L’Equipe . Despite interest from Chelsea, Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim recently confirmed that Garnacho is part of his long-term plans at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Donyell Malen arrives in full bloom for Aston Villa debut on familiar ground
arts.sum: Forward’s coaches share what makes the former Arsenal youth so special as he returns to the Emirates with new club The memories will surely come flooding back for Donyell Malen. Perhaps in the minutes before arriving at the Emirates Stadium. Maybe en route if Aston Villa’s team bus bypasses St Albans, where he lived in an apartment, a few miles up the road from Arsenal’s training base in Hertfordshire. On Saturday the forward, Villa’s new signing from Borussia Dortmund, could make his Premier League debut at the club where he spent two years as a youngster. He left Ajax for London at 16 but returned aged 18 to the Netherlands with their rivals PSV Eindhoven, and there Malen began to realise his potential. Malen excelled during six months with Jong PSV, outscoring Cody Gakpo to finish the 2017-18 season as the under-23s’ top goalscorer and making his first-team Eredivisie debut in the February of a title-winning campaign. “He was at Arsenal doing his thing, a good player but not using all his skills,” says Twan Scheepers, now the Jong PSV manager, who worked closely with Malen as an individual attacking coach and the assistant manager. Continue reading...

arts.sum: According to Bild, Bayern Munich are interested in signing Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens. It had previously been reported that Der Rekordmeister were targeting Chelsea’s Christopher Nkunku, having already agreed…
